page_metadata.bioconda__summary: rnaQUAST is a tool for evaluating RNA-Seq assemblies using reference genome and gene database. In addition, rnaQUAST is also capable of estimating gene database coverage by raw reads and de novo quality assessment using third-party software.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Rnaquast is a tool for evaluating rna-seq assemblies using reference genome and gene database. in addition, rnaquast is also capable of estimating gene database coverage by raw reads and de novo quality assessment using third-party software.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Quality assessment tool for de novo transcriptome assemblies.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Quality assessment tool for de novo transcriptome assemblies.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: rnaQuast (RNA Quality Assessment Tool) evaluates genome assemblies.
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: Quality assessment tool for de novo transcriptome assemblies.
